$comment: Declares this repo's external skill dependency so collaborators get it reproducibly WITHOUT vendoring. On clone + workspace-trust, Claude Code registers the marketplace and enables the official document-skills bundle (which contains the `pptx` build toolchain). The plugin files cache in ~/.claude/plugins (never committed here) -- Anthropic's skill license forbids copying them into a repo. Manual fallback: /plugin install document-skills@anthropic-agent-skills
